zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Stuteville於1194年之前出生在英國越可爾伯頓 阿格尼斯時，她的父親Roger de Stuteville I74歲，母親Agnes54歲。她與Roger de Colville結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1265年10月25日在英國林可爾史爾卡素 白坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice de Stuteville于1194年之前出生在英国越可爾伯頓 阿格尼斯时，她的父亲Roger de Stuteville I74岁，母亲Agnes54岁。她与Roger de Colville结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1265年10月25日在英国林可爾史爾卡素 白坦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Stuteville was born before 1194, in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England, her father, Roger de Stuteville I, was 74 and her mother, Agnes, was 54. She married Roger de Colville. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 25 October 1265, in Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Stuteville est née avant 1194, à Burton Agnes, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Stuteville I, avait 74 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 54 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Colville. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 octobre 1265, à Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Stuteville vor 1194 in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Stuteville I 74 und ihre Mutter Agnes 54. Sie hat Roger de Colville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Oktober 1265 in Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Stuteville è nata il prima del 1194 nel Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Roger de Stuteville I, aveva 74 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 54 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Colville. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1265, nel Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Stutevilleが1194年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアブルトン アグネスで生まれた時，父Roger de Stuteville Iは74歳，母Agnesは54歳であった。Roger de Colvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1265年10月25日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアカストル ブイサムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Stuteville(이)가 1194년 이전 영국 요르크실르 버턴 애그니스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Stuteville I(은)는 74세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 54세였다. 그녀는 Roger de Colville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 10월 25일 영국 링코실르 카스틀 비섬에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Stuteville nasceu antes 1194, em Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Stuteville I, tinha 74 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 54 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Colville. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1265, em Castle Bytham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Stuteville родилась перед 1194 г. в местности буртон агнесь, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Stuteville I было 74 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 54. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Colville. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 октября 1265 г. в местности кастл битам, линколншир, Англия.
